title: Experience lately have been very poor.
review: Experience lately have been very poor.Between the handling charges and only been able to receive e-tickets rather than paper tickets.Add to this dynamic pricing which is just ridiculous.But most importantly is the constant excuses I have been given about receiving payment after I resold a ticket through their platform.The account was verified weeks ago. description: Ticketmaster: All your entertainment needs under one virtual roof with tickets for theatre, concerts, sport, family events, clubs and more.
title: Worst Show I’ve Ever Seen.
review: Unprofessional production, started 15 minutes late and was boring throughout. We left 40 minutes into act 1 because it was just that bad. The sound production was terrible, we were near the front and could hardly understand what they were singing/saying which really took us out. The script was incredibly unfunny, using crude words in the place of jokes is funny the first time but after a while you’re just beating a dead horse. We only paid £15 each because we were able to get discounted tickets, but even that feels like far too much. I would seek a refund if I couldn’t but as the event was not postponed or cancelled, it is not an option. Throughly disappointing evening and would definitely not recommended. If you wanted to go see a similar show I would recommend you go somewhere local or to an established theatre group where they value professionalism.

review: I find it really difficult that you insist on ticketless and it has to be on the app. I have a disability and only have one arm and the whole process is really unhelpful and is discriminatory against those who don’t have the apps knowledge, capacity or like me have a physical disability which makes this system so hard. description: Ticketmaster: All your entertainment needs under one virtual roof with tickets for theatre, concerts, sport, family events, clubs and more.
title: Massively disappointed
review: Massively disappointed, the event (Jurassic World at Trafford) was cancelled on the day. Only by chance found out two hours before as went onto Ticketmaster to check directions. Didn’t receive a text message/email until 1hr 40 before the event would have started.  Very lucky we hadn’t set off to go there - I suspect there must have been many families travelling from further afield who would have arrived to be told it wasn’t going ahead. No apology from Ticketmaster or the event organiser. Just an email stating we’d get a refund. This was the second time our booking for the event had been cancelled so have lost out on two booking fees and got absolutely nothing apart from a huge disappointment. Am just thankful I had delayed telling my kids about the treat after being aware it might be cancelled after the first one was cancelled with no explanation.

description: Ticketmaster: All your entertainment needs under one virtual roof with tickets for theatre, concerts, sport, family events, clubs and more.
title: Appaling Customer Service
review: Arrived on time to be greeted by a poor girl whose job it was to inform people that the event had been cancelled due to the cold weather.Then checked my messages to find a text and email sent 10 minutes before the scheduled tart time to tell me that it was cancelled and I would receive a refund.Then had a little walk around and went back to see if anything had changed and just a note on the door saying it was cancelled.Very poor communication, appalling customer service and still waiting for a refund. A whole day wasted, £40 travelling expenses and two very upset children.I accept that things go wrong but the way this was communicated, handled and followed up was so unprofessional considering the size of the exhibition and cost of the tickets.

title: Scam of the year + problematic organization I don't recommend !!!!
review: Two tickets for €80 and 10 minutes of fire? The scam of the year! I strongly advise against this unless you want to waste your time and money! To get out and get back to the hotel at 00:10 with thousands of people, you'll need 2 hours to find an open metro station (doing everything on foot, of course) with police officers telling you the opposite. The organization was more than suspicious, and our money was only used to pay the police to block the stations!
